title: Consultation: Guidelines for recreational water quality: Physical, aesthetic and chemical characteristics - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation: Guidelines for recreational water quality: Physical, aesthetic and chemical characteristics

## Current status: Open
Opened on June 11, 2021 and will close to new input on August 11, 2021.
Find out how to participate in the consultation for the guideline technical document on Physical, Aesthetic and Chemical Characteristics.

## Join in: how to participate
Read the consultation document and submit your comments to the Water and Air Quality Bureau, Health Canada. Include the title of the consultation document on which you're commenting.
Send an email to hc.water-eau.sc@canada.ca with your input or comments.

## About the consultation

### Why we are consulting
The purpose of this consultation is to solicit comments on the proposed guidelines for Canadian recreational water quality.

## Who is the focus of this consultation
This consultation is intended for scientific or technical audiences, including:
- industry stakeholders
- academic communities
- health protection agencies
Comments are also welcome from members of the general public.
- Guidelines for Canadian Recreational Water Quality – Third Edition
Email: hc.water-eau.sc@canada.ca
